scripts.postinstall: npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix api install
scripts.dev:infra: docker compose up -d postgres redis minio minio-init livekit
scripts.dev:infra:stop: docker compose stop postgres redis minio minio-init livekit
scripts.dev:local: npm run dev:infra && concurrently -k -n api,socket,frontend "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:socket" "npm run dev:frontend"
